description: CompositionBlue, yellow and black checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with double top-stitching, a full front buttoned placket, tortoise shell buttons, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm buttoned tab, yoked back with, one pocket on left chest with embroidered branding and a curved hem FitSlimWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its bold checks will give you a dashing air. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
